name: @lehuan/swiper-loop-carousel
description: Swiper-based infinite loop carousel with thumbnail drag navigation, zoom, and multi-view modes

scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && git push --follow-tags && node -e "const v=require('./package.json').version; require('child_process').execSync('gh release create v'+v+' --title v'+v+' --notes "" --latest',{stdio:'inherit'})"
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && git push --follow-tags && node -e "const v=require('./package.json').version; require('child_process').execSync('gh release create v'+v+' --title v'+v+' --notes "" --latest',{stdio:'inherit'})"
scripts.release:major: npm version major && git push --follow-tags && node -e "const v=require('./package.json').version; require('child_process').execSync('gh release create v'+v+' --title v'+v+' --notes "" --latest',{stdio:'inherit'})"

author: lehuan
